textByHash.d36e1d4dab274829a6e9e9ffec852afe15a3fea6: I'm responsible for organising and selling off any surplus ranging supplies.
textByHash.e9643292ba82327b87d456ed3fe3bf7c24acce96: Those fellows over in Lovakengj are an efficient bunch... They often produce far more than the army actually needs.
textByHash.97bd7a8c40f7f05b01b337ec49e4ff3d275c3f05: I've got a wide selection of ranged weapons and ammo, if you wanted to take a look? Its all good stuff.
